components.name: AvatarStoryDemoComponent
components.template:
Gravitas Avatar

Compact identity primitive for people, assignees, account chips, table rows, comments, headers, and lightweight admin UI surfaces.

Initials
Image avatars
Shapes
Fallback behavior
Sizes
In context
Simón Tang
Agency Owner
Active
Team row example
Caitlin Morris
Senior Coordinator
Toronto
Andrés Rojas
Broker
Remote
components.sourceCode:
import type { Meta, StoryObj } from '@storybook/angular'; import { Component } from '@angular/core'; import { Avatar } from './avatar'; @Component({ selector: 'gv-avatar-demo', standalone: true, imports: [Avatar], template: `
Gravitas Avatar

Compact identity primitive for people, assignees, account chips, table rows, comments, headers, and lightweight admin UI surfaces.

Initials
Image avatars
Shapes
Fallback behavior
Sizes
In context
Simón Tang
Agency Owner
Active
Team row example
Caitlin Morris
Senior Coordinator
Toronto
Andrés Rojas
Broker
Remote
`, }) class AvatarStoryDemoComponent {} const meta: Meta = { title: 'Gravitas/Avatar', component: AvatarStoryDemoComponent, }; export default meta; type Story = StoryObj; export const Default: Story = {};

components.name: CheckboxStoryDemoComponent
components.template:
Gravitas Checkbox

Premium, form-friendly checkbox control for settings panels, filters, table bulk actions, and admin-style forms.

Basic
Sizes
Indeterminate and disabled
Helper and error text
Settings panel example

propertiesClass.name: settings

components.sourceCode:
import type { Meta, StoryObj } from '@storybook/angular'; import { Component } from '@angular/core'; import { FormsModule } from '@angular/forms'; import { Checkbox } from './checkbox'; @Component({ selector: 'gv-checkbox-demo', standalone: true, imports: [FormsModule, Checkbox], template: `
Gravitas Checkbox

Premium, form-friendly checkbox control for settings panels, filters, table bulk actions, and admin-style forms.

Basic
Sizes
Indeterminate and disabled
Helper and error text
Settings panel example
`, }) class CheckboxStoryDemoComponent { notifications = true; emailUpdates = false; smallChecked = true; mediumChecked = false; largeChecked = true; termsAccepted = false; settings = { email: true, browser: true, weekly: false, }; } const meta: Meta = { title: 'Gravitas/Checkbox', component: CheckboxStoryDemoComponent, }; export default meta; type Story = StoryObj; export const Default: Story = {};

components.name: TooltipStoryDemoComponent
components.template:
Gravitas Tooltip

Quiet, premium tooltip styling for dashboards, forms, tables, and actions. Supports placement, trigger modes, disabled state, and compact text wrapping.

Status badge Hover or focus this text
components.sourceCode:
import type { Meta, StoryObj } from '@storybook/angular'; import { Component } from '@angular/core'; import { GvTooltipDirective } from './tooltip-directive'; @Component({ selector: 'gv-tooltip-demo', standalone: true, imports: [GvTooltipDirective], template: `
Gravitas Tooltip

Quiet, premium tooltip styling for dashboards, forms, tables, and actions. Supports placement, trigger modes, disabled state, and compact text wrapping.

Status badge Hover or focus this text
`, }) class TooltipStoryDemoComponent {} const meta: Meta = { title: 'GRAVITAS/Tooltip', component: TooltipStoryDemoComponent, }; export default meta; type Story = StoryObj; export const Default: Story = {};
